name_cn:
💰Saddle Oblique woc mini
Dior bestseller 🌟 Best value classic vintage canvas
Antique gold chain can be worn crossbody or as a mini shoulder bag inside
Fits iPhone X, has many card slots
Includes a matching card case inside that can be used separately
Tapestry canvas has become a signature series
The matching dark blue leather develops a beautiful, warm vintage luster over time
Size: 19*11*2.5 cm
